title: dianthus jacquemontii
intro: Dianthus jacquemontii, also known as the White Spur or Jacquemont's Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Dianthus jacquemontii is often used as an infusion or decoction, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
